name: Amulet of Health
stat_impact: Permanent: Constitution score becomes 19. No effect if Con is already 19 or higher.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Hill)
stat_impact: Permanent: Strength score becomes 21.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Frost/Stone)
stat_impact: Permanent: Strength score becomes 23.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Fire)
stat_impact: Permanent: Strength score becomes 25.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Cloud)
stat_impact: Permanent: Strength score becomes 27.

name: Belt of Giant Strength (Storm)
stat_impact: Permanent: Strength score becomes 29.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
stat_impact: Permanent: Strength score becomes 19.

name: Headband of Intellect
stat_impact: Permanent: Intelligence score becomes 19.

name: Bracers of Defense
stat_impact: Permanent: +2 bonus to AC while wearing no armor and using no shield.

name: Cloak of Protection
stat_impact: Permanent: +1 bonus to AC and Saving Throws.

name: Cloak of Displacement
stat_impact: Permanent: Creatures have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you.

name: Goggles of Night
stat_impact: Permanent: Grants Darkvision out to 60 feet.

name: Periapt of Wound Closure
stat_impact: Permanent: Automatically stabilize when dying; double HP regained from hit dice.

name: Winged Boots
stat_impact: Permanent: Flying speed equal to walking speed for up to 4 hours.

name: Cloak of Invisibility
stat_impact: Utility: Turn invisible for up to 2 hours per day.

name: Efreeti Bottle
stat_impact: Utility: Can summon an Efreeti which may serve or attack.

name: Helm of Brilliance
stat_impact: Permanent: Resistance to Fire; weapon deals extra 1d6 fire; various spell gems.

name: Talisman of Pure Good
stat_impact: Utility: Can potentially instant-kill an evil creature (DC 20 Dex).

name: Bag of Holding
stat_impact: Utility: Can hold up to 500 lbs in a demiplane.

name: Handy Haversack
stat_impact: Utility: Organized storage; item you need is always on top.

name: Portable Hole
stat_impact: Utility: 10ft deep extra-dimensional hole.

name: Alchemy Jug
stat_impact: Utility: Produces various liquids (2 gallons of mayo, etc.).

name: Eldritch Claw Tattoo
stat_impact: Permanent: +1 bonus to attack/damage for unarmed strikes. Reach becomes 15ft for 1 min.

name: Barrier Tattoo (Large)
stat_impact: Permanent: AC becomes 18 while wearing no armor.

name: Manual of Bodily Health
stat_impact: Permanent: Constitution score and maximum for that score increase by 2.

name: Manual of Gainful Exercise
stat_impact: Permanent: Strength score and maximum for that score increase by 2.

name: Manual of Quickness of Action
stat_impact: Permanent: Dexterity score and maximum for that score increase by 2.

name: Tome of Clear Thought
stat_impact: Permanent: Intelligence score and maximum for that score increase by 2.

name: Tome of Leadership and Influence
stat_impact: Permanent: Charisma score and maximum for that score increase by 2.

name: Tome of Understanding
stat_impact: Permanent: Wisdom score and maximum for that score increase by 2.

name: Orb of Dragonkind
stat_impact: Utility: Control or call dragons. Various minor/major properties.

name: Luxon Beacon
stat_impact: Utility: Grants a fragment of possibility (reroll). Lore-heavy.

name: Mirror of Life Trapping
stat_impact: Utility: Can trap creatures inside mirror cells.
